descFull: Game-development Agent Skills for AI coding agents: install once and a master router loads the right skill for your engine and task. 66 original, version-pinned skills (plus a master router) in the portable SKILL.md format that runs across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, Gemini CLI and more, for Godot, Unity, Unreal, web and beyond.
